series_metadata.series_title: Motor Fuel Refund Disbursement Journals, Journal E
series_metadata.series_description: Disbursement journals indicating name, address and warrant amount for all refunds paid. Journal entries authorizing the refund journals; Vouchers issued to OBM and Auditor of State authorizing refund disbursements.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: expiration of calendar year in which documents are journalized. ; Electronic: 4 yrs expiration of calendar year in which documents are journalized
